page_content:
GREK398 Advanced Modern Greek (3 Credits)

Develops advanced communication skills in the modern Greek language: speaking, listening, reading, and writing.

Prerequisite: GREK212; or permission of ARHU-Classics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

GREK399 Topics in Advanced Modern Greek Language & Culture (3 Credits)

Development of communicative skills in advanced Modern Greek. Topics will be drawn from the social and folk life of modern Greece. Prerequisite: GREK212; or permission of ARHU-Classics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits.
